prevalence.trend: increasing prevalence with aging and improved survival

incidence.source: Cancer registry and hematology cohort data

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; chronic disease with treatment-related morbidity

vulnerablePopulations: patients with family history of CLL
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Persistent lymphocytosis with immunophenotyping by flow cytometry; staging by Rai/Binet

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; access to targeted therapies limited by cost

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Flow cytometry available in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Watchful waiting for early-stage; chemoimmunotherapy or targeted agents for progression
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Cost of targeted therapies and access to specialized hematology care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing cancer centers and registry coverage
